engineIntelligence.h2: Cadillac Eldorado Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Cadillac Eldorado in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data for US-import classics.

cards.altText: Cadillac Eldorado LD8 engine - petrol 4.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Head bolt thread failure - aluminium block threads pull out around 120k miles causing overheating.
Water pump failure - electric pump degradation leads to coolant circulation loss at higher mileage.
Intake manifold gasket leak - plastic gaskets fail causing coolant leaks between 70-110k miles.

cards.altText: Cadillac Eldorado HT4100 engine - petrol 4.1L replacement UK
knownFailures: Head gasket failure - coolant intrusion into cylinders common at 90k miles on digital FI units.
Thermostat housing crack - plastic housing fractures causing coolant loss and overheating risk.
Digital FI calibration drift - fuel injection system requires specialist recalibration after rebuild.

cards.altText: Cadillac Eldorado 472ci engine - petrol 7.4L replacement UK
knownFailures: Valve guide wear - causes increased oil consumption and blue smoke at 100k+ miles on big-blocks.
Rear main seal leak - viton seal degradation leads to oil leaks at 70-100k miles.
Distributor gear wear - causes timing drift and rough running on high-mileage OHV units.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £8,400-£12,000 (supply only) Estimated from comparable big-block units - actual quotes may vary.

engineGuide.h2: Cadillac Eldorado Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Cadillac Eldorado across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 4.6L Petrol
entries.history: The base Northstar 4.6L DOHC V8 brought modern twin-cam performance to the Eldorado, but aluminium block head bolt threads became its Achilles heel.
compatibleVariants: Coupe, Convertible, Touring Coupe, Base Trim
commonFailures: Head bolt thread pull-out in aluminium block at 120k miles - documented across UK imports per Cadillac TSB 98-T-006
Electric water pump failure causing coolant circulation loss at 100k+ miles
Plastic intake manifold gasket degradation leading to coolant leaks 70-110k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for LD8 Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

entries.title: 4.6L Petrol
entries.history: The high-output Northstar L37 powered ETC and Platinum models, delivering 300hp with performance-tuned calibration and upgraded cooling.
compatibleVariants: ETC (Electrical Touring Coupe), Platinum Edition, Performance Trim
commonFailures: Head bolt thread failure identical to LD8 - Timesert repair essential during rebuild
Performance cooling system strain accelerates water pump wear under UK driving conditions
Timing chain guide wear causing rattle at higher mileage on spirited-driven examples
entries.cta: Get quotes for L37 Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

entries.title: 4.1L Petrol
entries.history: Cadillac's pioneering digital fuel injection V8 offered efficiency for its era but suffered head gasket failures that defined the transitional Eldorado generation.
compatibleVariants: Coupe, Convertible, Base Trim, Digital FI Specification
commonFailures: Head gasket failure causing coolant intrusion into cylinders at 90k miles - revised MLS gaskets now standard in rebuilds
Plastic thermostat housing crack leading to coolant loss and overheating risk at 50-80k miles
Digital fuel injection calibration drift requiring specialist adaptation post-rebuild
entries.cta: Get quotes for HT4100 Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

entries.title: 7.4L Petrol
entries.history: The legendary 472ci big-block defined the personal luxury Eldorado era with massive torque and classic American V8 character for collector enthusiasts.
compatibleVariants: Coupe, Convertible, Personal Luxury Era Trim, Heritage Specification
commonFailures: Valve guide wear causing increased oil consumption and blue smoke at 100k+ miles on high-mileage units
Rear main seal viton degradation leading to oil leaks at 70-100k miles - updated seals now fitted
Distributor drive gear wear causing timing drift and rough running on original-spec examples
entries.cta: Get quotes for 472ci Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

entries.title: 8.2L Petrol
entries.history: The ultimate big-block Eldorado engine, the 500ci delivered peak American luxury performance and remains the most sought-after collector powerplant.
compatibleVariants: Coupe, Convertible, Personal Luxury Era, Collector Specification, Matching Numbers Builds
commonFailures: Valve guide and piston ring wear causing oil consumption at 100k+ miles - bronze guides now standard in heritage rebuilds
Rear main seal leaks identical to 472ci - precision machining and updated viton seals included
Oil pump pressure drop on high-mileage units - high-volume pumps fitted during specialist rebuilds
entries.cta: Get quotes for 500ci Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

entries.title: 7.0L Petrol
entries.history: The transitional L26 425ci bridged the big-block and downsized eras, offering classic OHV character with improved efficiency for the late-1970s Eldorado.
compatibleVariants: Coupe, Convertible, Downsized Era Trim, Transitional Specification
commonFailures: Valve guide wear patterns similar to 472/500ci - bronze guide upgrades recommended during rebuild
Carburettor calibration drift on original-spec units - specialist tuning required for UK fuel compatibility
Ancillary component compatibility verification essential for US-import chassis during replacement
entries.cta: Get quotes for L26 Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Cadillac Eldorado Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Cadillac Eldorado's engine reliability varies significantly by generation: Northstar 4.6L V8s (1992-2002) dominate UK replacement demand due to head bolt thread failures, while HT4100 4.1L units (1982-1987) suffer head gasket coolant intrusion, and big-block 472/500ci engines (1968-1976) face valve guide wear at high mileage. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Northstar Head Bolt Thread Failure - Why Cadillac Eldorado LD8/L37 Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac Eldorado Coupe, Convertible, Touring, ETC, Platinum (1992-2002, LD8 & L37 Northstar 4.6L DOHC V8)
problems.rootCause: Aluminium cylinder block head bolt threads pull out under thermal cycling and torque load, causing head gasket failure, coolant loss and overheating.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder heads, install Timesert threaded inserts per Cadillac TSB 98-T-006, renew head gaskets and bolts
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before catastrophic thread pull-out; extends engine life 50-80k miles if cooling system maintained

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full head reconditioning, Timesert installation, valve service, new gaskets, coolant system flush and component inspection
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable for engines with good block condition; addresses head-side failures but not block wear

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt / Reconditioned Northstar Engine
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt engine with Timesert head bolt repair as standard, upgraded water pump, silicone hoses, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for engines with block wear, high mileage, or multiple failure points; supply & fit available nationwide

problems.recommendation: On a Cadillac Eldorado Northstar showing early overheating or coolant loss at 100k+ miles, a preventative Timesert repair can be cost-effective if the block is sound. However, if thread pull-out has occurred or the engine has suffered overheating damage, a full rebuilt unit with Timesert repair included offers better long-term value and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt Northstar LD8/L37 engine prices for your Cadillac Eldorado

problems.h4: HT4100 Head Gasket Coolant Intrusion - Why Cadillac Eldorado 4.1L Engines Fail
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac Eldorado Coupe, Convertible (1982-1987, HT4100 4.1L Digital FI V8)
problems.rootCause: Original composite head gaskets degrade under thermal stress, allowing coolant to intrude into cylinders or oil passages, causing misfires, white smoke and potential hydro-lock.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Head Gasket Replacement with MLS Upgrade
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder heads, fit revised multi-layer steel (MLS) gaskets, renew coolant pipes and thermostat housing, system flush
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block and heads are undamaged; MLS gaskets significantly improve longevity over original spec

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt engine with MLS head gaskets, aluminium coolant pipe upgrades, digital FI calibration check, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for engines with cylinder scoring, block corrosion from coolant intrusion, or multiple high-mileage wear items

problems.recommendation: For HT4100 engines showing early coolant loss or white smoke, an MLS head gasket upgrade with aluminium coolant pipe replacement offers excellent value and addresses the root cause. However, if coolant has contaminated oil or cylinders show scoring, a full rebuilt unit is the more reliable long-term solution for US-import classics.
problems.cta: Get quotes for HT4100 Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

problems.h4: Big-Block Valve Guide Wear - Why Cadillac Eldorado 472/500ci Engines Consume Oil
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac Eldorado Coupe, Convertible (1968-1976, 472ci 7.4L & 500ci 8.2L OHV V8)
problems.rootCause: Original cast-iron valve guides wear under high-mileage use, allowing excessive valve stem clearance that increases oil consumption and produces blue exhaust smoke.

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Cylinder Head Reconditioning + Bronze Guides
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove heads, install bronze valve guides, renew valve stem seals, machine seats, pressure test, system reassembly
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable for engines with good block condition and no bottom-end wear; bronze guides significantly outlast original spec

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Heritage Rebuilt Big-Block Engine
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt engine with bronze valve guides, updated piston rings, rear main seal upgrade, period-correct components, heritage documentation, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Essential for collector vehicles requiring matching-numbers authenticity or engines with bottom-end wear; specialist heritage rebuilds preserve classic value

problems.recommendation: For big-block Eldorados showing oil consumption but otherwise mechanically sound, a cylinder head reconditioning with bronze valve guides offers excellent value. However, for collector-grade vehicles or engines with additional wear items, a full heritage-spec rebuilt engine with documentation preserves investment value and provides comprehensive warranty coverage.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 472/500ci big-block engine prices for your Cadillac Eldorado

problems.h4: Northstar Cooling System Failure - Why Cadillac Eldorado Engines Overheat
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac Eldorado all Northstar variants (1992-2002, LD8 & L37 4.6L DOHC V8)
problems.rootCause: Electric water pump motor degradation, plastic thermostat housing cracking, and intake manifold gasket failure combine to reduce coolant flow and cause overheating, accelerating head bolt thread stress.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace electric water pump, aluminium thermostat housing, intake manifold gaskets, silicone hoses, system flush and pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative maintenance for engines under 100k miles; addresses common failure points before catastrophic damage occurs

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Northstar with Cooling Upgrades
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt engine with upgraded water pump, aluminium housing, silicone hoses, Timesert head bolts, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for engines that have overheated or show multiple cooling system failures; comprehensive solution prevents repeat issues

problems.recommendation: For Northstar Eldorados under 100k miles with no overheating history, proactive cooling system component replacement offers excellent preventative value. However, if the engine has experienced overheating or shows multiple cooling failures, a full rebuilt unit with all cooling upgrades included provides superior long-term reliability and warranty protection for US-import classics.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Northstar cooling system upgrade with Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Cadillac Eldorado
finalCta.paragraph: The Cadillac Eldorado's engine challenges are well-documented but entirely manageable with the right specialist support. Whether you're dealing with Northstar head bolt concerns, HT4100 head gasket issues, or big-block valve guide wear, EngineMarket connects you with UK specialists who understand US-import classic American V8s. Compare prices from vetted suppliers, all offering rebuilt engines with upgraded components addressing the original failure point, backed by a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide supply & fit options. Get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Cadillac Eldorado Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Cadillac Eldorado and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Cadillac Eldorado Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Cadillac Eldorado's production timeline (1968-2002), organised so UK import owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from specialists.

years.description: The golden era of Eldorado introduced the legendary 472ci and 500ci big-block OHV V8s that defined American luxury performance for collector enthusiasts.
keyChanges: 1968: Introduction of 472ci (7.4L) OHV big-block V8, replacing previous smaller units
1970: Launch of ultimate 500ci (8.2L) big-block V8 for peak torque and collector appeal

years.preview: 1976: Refinements to emissions and fuel delivery while maintaining big-block character
knownFor: Massive low-end torque delivering classic American cruising character and effortless acceleration
Valve guide wear causing oil consumption at 100k+ miles on high-mileage big-block units
Rear main seal viton degradation leading to oil leaks at 70-100k miles on original-spec engines
Heritage documentation and matching-numbers authenticity critical for collector value preservation
years.cta: Get quotes for 1968-1976 Cadillac Eldorado big-block engine replacement
years.ticker: Cadillac Eldorado 472ci engine replacement UK • Cadillac Eldorado 500ci big-block rebuild • Cadillac Eldorado big-block valve guide upgrade
enquiries: Cadillac Eldorado big-block valve guide upgrade

years.description: The downsized Eldorado introduced the L26 425ci OHV V8, balancing classic American torque with improved efficiency for the late-1970s fuel-conscious market.
keyChanges: 1977: Introduction of L26 425ci (7.0L) OHV V8 replacing big-blocks for improved fuel economy
Platform downsizing reduced weight while maintaining luxury appointments and V8 character
Emissions compliance updates for evolving US regulations affecting UK import specifications
knownFor: Transitional engineering balancing classic torque with emerging efficiency requirements
Valve guide wear patterns similar to big-blocks requiring bronze guide upgrades during rebuild
Carburettor calibration verification essential for UK unleaded petrol compatibility on US imports
Ancillary component compatibility checks critical during engine replacement for import chassis
years.cta: Get quotes for 1977-1979 Cadillac Eldorado L26 engine replacement

years.description: The HT4100 4.1L digital fuel injection V8 brought pioneering electronic management to the Eldorado but suffered head gasket failures that define replacement demand for these classics.
keyChanges: 1982: Launch of HT4100 4.1L digital fuel injection V8 with electronic engine management
Introduction of composite head gaskets later revised to multi-layer steel (MLS) for improved reliability
Digital FI calibration requirements necessitating specialist adaptation support for UK imports
mainEngines: HT4100 - 4.1L petrol digital FI V8 (Coupe 1982-1987, Convertible 1984-1987)
popularModels: Cadillac Eldorado Coupe Digital FI Specification
knownFor: Pioneering digital fuel injection technology offering improved efficiency for its era
Head gasket coolant intrusion at 90k miles requiring MLS gasket upgrades during rebuild
Plastic thermostat housing crack leading to coolant loss and overheating risk at 50-80k miles
Digital FI calibration drift requiring specialist adaptation post-rebuild for reliable operation
years.cta: Get quotes for 1982-1987 Cadillac Eldorado HT4100 engine replacement
years.ticker: Cadillac Eldorado HT4100 head gasket replacement • Cadillac Eldorado 4.1L coolant leak fix • Cadillac Eldorado digital FI calibration support
enquiries: Cadillac Eldorado HT4100 head gasket replacement
Cadillac Eldorado digital FI calibration support

years.description: The Northstar 4.6L DOHC twin-cam V8 defined the final Eldorado generation, delivering modern performance but requiring Timesert head bolt repair to address aluminium block thread failure patterns.
keyChanges: 1992: Launch of LD8 Northstar 4.6L DOHC V8 with aluminium block and twin-cam architecture
1994: Introduction of high-output L37 Northstar for ETC and Platinum performance variants
1996+: Revised cooling components and updated head bolt torque specifications per Cadillac TSB 98-T-006
knownFor: Modern twin-cam performance with smooth power delivery and refined NVH characteristics
Head bolt thread pull-out in aluminium block at 120k miles dominating UK replacement enquiries
Electric water pump failure and intake manifold gasket leaks as common cooling system failure points
GM SPS2 PCM coding requirement post-installation for Northstar units on US-import classics
years.cta: Get quotes for 1992-2002 Cadillac Eldorado Northstar engine replacement
years.ticker: Cadillac Eldorado Northstar head bolt Timesert • Cadillac Eldorado LD8 engine replacement UK • Cadillac Eldorado L37 ETC performance rebuild
enquiries: Cadillac Eldorado Northstar head bolt Timesert
Cadillac Eldorado LD8 engine replacement UK

faq.h2: Cadillac Eldorado Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement costs vary by generation: HT4100 4.1L rebuilds range £4,200-£6,100, Northstar 4.6L units £6,800-£9,400, and big-block 472/500ci engines £8,400-£15,000 supply-only, with supply & fit adding £1,200-£2,800 depending on variant and location.
keyPoints: HT4100 4.1L digital FI rebuilds: £4,200-£6,100 supply-only
Northstar LD8/L37 4.6L rebuilt engines: £6,800-£9,400 including Timesert repair
Big-block 472ci/500ci heritage rebuilds: £8,400-£15,000 for collector-spec units
Supply & fit installation adds £1,200-£2,800 depending on RHD conversion complexity
All prices include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK specialists
items.cta: Compare Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement prices for your variant

items.question: What engine codes are used in the Cadillac Eldorado?
items.answer: Cadillac Eldorado engines include HT4100 4.1L digital FI (1982-1987), LD8/L37 Northstar 4.6L DOHC (1992-2002), and big-block 472ci/500ci OHV V8s (1968-1976), plus transitional L26 425ci (1977-1979) for US-import classics.
keyPoints: HT4100: 4.1L digital fuel injection V8, 135-140hp, head gasket failure pattern
LD8/L37: 4.6L Northstar DOHC twin-cam, 270-300hp, head bolt thread failure risk
472ci/500ci: 7.4L/8.2L OHV big-block, 375-400hp, valve guide wear at high mileage
L26: 7.0L transitional OHV V8, 190hp, carburettor calibration verification needed
Enter your registration or US VIN to confirm exact engine code compatibility
items.cta: Verify your Cadillac Eldorado engine code for accurate replacement quoting

items.question: How long does a Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement take in the UK?
items.answer: Typical turnaround for Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement is 5-10 working days for rebuilt units from UK stock, plus 2-3 days for specialist installation; US-import core engines may require 14-21 days for sourcing and shipping.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines from UK stock: 5-10 working days dispatch
Specialist supply & fit installation: 2-3 working days depending on variant
US-import core sourcing: 14-21 days additional for big-block or rare Northstar units
GM SPS2 PCM coding for Northstar units adds 1 working day post-installation
DVLA documentation and classic car insurance notification included with all replacements
items.cta: Check live Cadillac Eldorado engine stock and delivery timelines

items.question: Do I need GM coding after fitting a new Cadillac Eldorado Northstar engine?
items.answer: Yes, Northstar LD8/L37 engines require GM SPS2 PCM adaptation after replacement to pair the new engine with your Eldorado's vehicle security and fuel management systems for reliable operation.
keyPoints: Northstar engines are VIN-paired to vehicle PCM for immobiliser and fuel calibration
GM SPS2 adaptation software required to program new engine to existing PCM
Specialist referral to classic GM diagnostics technicians included with Northstar replacements
Failure to complete coding may cause no-start conditions or poor running characteristics
Coding support documentation provided for UK-based classic American V8 specialists
items.cta: Get quotes for Northstar engine replacement including GM coding support

items.question: What warranty comes with a Cadillac Eldorado replacement engine in the UK?
items.answer: All Cadillac Eldorado replacement engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering internal components, valid for UK imports with DVLA documentation and classic vehicle insurance.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard on all rebuilt/reconditioned units
Coverage includes internal components, gaskets, seals and upgraded failure-point parts
Valid for US-import classics with proper DVLA V5C update documentation
Classic car insurance notification paperwork included with all replacements
Extended 24-month warranty available for collector-spec heritage rebuilds
items.cta: Compare Cadillac Eldorado engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: Can I upgrade my Cadillac Eldorado engine during replacement in the UK?
items.answer: Yes, performance upgrades are available for Cadillac Eldorado engine replacements including Northstar Timesert enhancements, big-block stroker kits, and electronic ignition conversions for US-import classics.
keyPoints: Northstar upgrades: Timesert head bolts, upgraded cooling, sport calibration support
Big-block enhancements: Bronze valve guides, high-volume oil pumps, electronic ignition
Heritage documentation packages available for matching-numbers collector restorations
Upgrade pricing quoted separately with component certification for insurance valuation
Specialist consultation recommended to ensure upgrade compatibility with import chassis

items.question: How do I know which Cadillac Eldorado variant I have for import?
items.answer: Check your US title, VIN or chassis number to confirm Coupe/Convertible body style, generation era (1968-1978/1979-1985/1986-1991/1992-2002), and engine code (HT4100/LD8/L37/472ci/500ci) for accurate replacement quoting.
keyPoints: US VIN/chassis decoder confirms body style, generation and original engine code
Registration lookup tool identifies variant for UK-registered import Eldorados
Engine bay inspection can verify code stampings on block/head for confirmation
Variant identification critical for mounting point, wiring and emissions compatibility
Specialist verification included with all quotes to prevent costly fitment errors
items.cta: Use our Cadillac Eldorado variant identification tool for accurate quoting

items.question: What causes Cadillac Eldorado engine failure most commonly in UK imports?
items.answer: Most common Cadillac Eldorado engine failures in UK imports are Northstar head bolt thread pull-out (LD8/L37 at 120k miles), HT4100 head gasket coolant intrusion (4.1L at 90k miles), and big-block valve guide wear (472/500ci at 100k+ miles).
keyPoints: Northstar: Aluminium block head bolt threads pull out causing overheating and head gasket failure
HT4100: Composite head gaskets degrade allowing coolant intrusion into cylinders or oil
Big-block: Cast-iron valve guides wear causing increased oil consumption and blue smoke
Cooling system component failures (water pump, thermostat housing) accelerate primary failures
All rebuilt engines include upgraded components addressing these documented failure patterns
items.cta: Get quotes for Cadillac Eldorado engine replacement addressing your specific failure

items.question: Is a used Cadillac Eldorado engine reliable for UK import?
items.answer: Used US-spec Cadillac Eldorado engines can be reliable if sourced from low-mileage, full-history donor vehicles; our used units undergo compression testing, leak-down verification and DTC scanning before dispatch to UK import owners.
keyPoints: Used engines sourced from low-mileage US donor vehicles with verifiable history
Compression testing and leak-down verification confirm mechanical integrity pre-dispatch
DTC scanning identifies hidden electronic or sensor issues before UK shipping
30-day warranty covers major internal components for initial confidence post-installation
Recommend professional installation and post-fit diagnostic check for import compliance
items.cta: Check availability of tested used Cadillac Eldorado engines for your variant
